title: kalimeris biennis
intro: Kalimeris biennis, also known as the autumn sneezewort or false sneezewort, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Europe and Asia. Traditionally, the plant's leaves and flowers have been used in herbal medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and acting as an expectorant to help clear mucus from the lungs. Kalimeris biennis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
